features: CLEAN & FRESH: Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with clean and fresh Ocean Breeze essential oils in a resealable bag for easy storage.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.
RESTFUL SLEEP: Adding epsom salts to a bath before bedtime will soothe and relax. The fresh ocean breeze fragrance will help aid a restful night's sleep.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 450g
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Epsom Salts, whether soaking your feet or taking a bath in espsom salts, you will soothe muscle aches, relax the body, improve circulation and even treat sunburn. Fragranced with clean and fresh Ocean Breeze essential oils in a resealable bag for easy storage. Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins . Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it. Ready to use, fragranced with the fresh scent of ocean breeze in a resealable bag 450g. Ingredients Epsomsalt Directions Add the required amount to bath water for soothing muscle aches, relaxation, improved circulation, sunburn treatment, and better sleep. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation. Avoid use on broken skin or sunburns. Keep out of eyes and ears. Do not ingest. Always test a small amount on skin before use. Use in a well-ventilated area. Rinse tub thoroughly after use. See more
